project.name: tlock
project.description: macOS CLI to lock folders (encrypted DMG) and apps (biometric gate) with Touch ID

phases.name: Scaffold npm project
phases.description: Initialized npm project with package.json, bin entry, commander bootstrap, and directory structure.

decisions.reason: chalk v5+ is ESM-only; keeps project modern
Industry standard, simple arg parsing, specified in task.yaml
Lightweight, widely used, good DX for error/success output

phases.name: Build config module
phases.description: JSON-backed lock registry at ~/.tlock/config.json for tracking all locked targets.

decisions.reason: XDG-style home directory convention; simple JSON persistence
Zero setup friction for first-time users

phases.name: Build auth module
phases.description: Touch ID via Swift/LocalAuthentication bridge, password fallback, macOS Keychain storage via security CLI.

decisions.decision: Use macOS `security` CLI for Keychain instead of keytar
decisions.reason: Avoids native node-gyp compilation; no Xcode CLI tools dependency

decisions.decision: Inline Swift source executed via `swift -e` for Touch ID
decisions.reason: Uses Apple's official LocalAuthentication (LAContext) framework; no native addon needed

decisions.decision: Readline with stdout muting for password input
decisions.reason: Zero-dependency hidden input; avoids inquirer bulk

auth_flow: 2. If unavailable (exit 2) or failed (exit 1), fall back to password prompt
3. Verify password against Keychain-stored master password

phases.name: Build lock-folder module
phases.description: Encrypted DMG creation/mount/unmount via hdiutil for folder locking.

decisions.reason: Strongest native encryption; compressed read-only format

decisions.decision: Password piped via spawn stdin (not TTY)
decisions.reason: hdiutil -stdinpass requires non-TTY stdin; spawn().stdin.write() handles this

decisions.decision: Deterministic DMG naming via SHA-256 hash of path
decisions.reason: Avoids collisions; predictable mapping from folder to DMG

decisions.decision: Verify DMG exists before deleting original folder
decisions.reason: Safety guard to prevent data loss on hdiutil failure

phases.name: Build lock-app module
phases.description: Binary rename interception: renames app executable, installs wrapper script that gates launch behind tlock auth-gate.

modifications_detail.bin/tlock.js: Added hidden `auth-gate` subcommand that runs authenticate() and exits 0/1

decisions.reason: Simple, reversible; wrapper replaces original binary path

decisions.decision: Wrapper calls `tlock auth-gate` then exec's original binary
decisions.reason: Keeps auth logic in Node.js; wrapper is minimal bash
User-visible feedback when app is double-clicked from Finder
SIP blocks modification; fail fast with clear message

decisions.decision: Read CFBundleExecutable from Info.plist via `defaults read`
decisions.reason: Correct way to find real binary name; not all apps use the bundle name

app_resolution_order: 1. Path ends with .app → use directly or check /Applications

phases.name: Wire CLI commands with error handling
phases.description: Replaced all stub commands with real module calls, added auto-detect routing, formatted output, and top-level error handling.

modifications_detail.bin/tlock.js: Full rewrite: imported all modules, added detectTargetType(), withErrorHandling() wrapper, wired lock/unlock/list/remove/status with real logic

commands.tlock <target>: Auto-detect folder vs app, route to lockFolder() or lockApp()
commands.tlock list: Color-coded table of all locked targets with timestamps
commands.tlock remove <target>: Authenticate + permanent restore for either type
commands.tlock status [target]: Summary counts or detailed entry info
commands.tlock auth-gate: Hidden; used by app wrapper script

target_detection_order: 3. found in registry → use stored type
4. exists on filesystem as directory → folder

phases.name: Prepare for npm publish
phases.description: README with full docs, .npmignore, package.json metadata (author, repo, homepage, os, files).

modifications_detail.package.json: Added author, repository, homepage, bugs, os=[darwin], files whitelist

bin/tlock.js.purpose: CLI entry point with commander, all commands wired

src/auth.js.purpose: Touch ID + password + Keychain auth flow

src/lock-folder.js.purpose: Encrypted DMG lifecycle for folder locking

src/lock-app.js.purpose: Binary rename interception for app locking

.npmignore.purpose: Excludes dev/planning files from npm tarball

known_issues.description: No automated tests yet. All modules need unit and integration tests.
known_issues.suggested_action: Add vitest or node:test with mocked child_process calls

known_issues.description: Built in a Linux CoderPad environment. No actual macOS testing has been done.
known_issues.suggested_action: Test all hdiutil, security, swift, and osascript calls on real macOS hardware

known_issues.description: Password fallback compares entered password directly against Keychain-stored value. Keychain itself is encrypted, but in-memory comparison is plain string equality.
known_issues.suggested_action: Acceptable since Keychain handles encryption at rest; consider timing-safe comparison

known_issues.description: Renaming app binaries invalidates code signatures. Gatekeeper may block modified apps.
known_issues.suggested_action: Document limitation; consider codesign --force re-signing or alternative interception strategy

known_issues.description: Mounted DMG volumes appear in Finder sidebar despite -nobrowse flag.
known_issues.suggested_action: Document that eject = re-lock; explore -nobrowse + -shadow options

known_issues.description: App wrapper script hardcodes the tlock binary path at lock time. If tlock is run via npx, the path may not persist.
known_issues.suggested_action: Recommend global install; or resolve tlock via PATH at wrapper runtime instead of hardcoding

known_issues.description: src/index.js barrel imports may fail until all 4 modules exist with default exports.
known_issues.suggested_action: Already resolved — all modules created with default exports

next_steps: Test on real macOS hardware (Touch ID, hdiutil, Keychain)
Run `npm pack` and verify tarball contents
Run `npm publish --dry-run` to validate registry readiness
Add automated tests (mock child_process for CI)
Consider timing-safe password comparison in auth.js
Fix wrapper script to resolve tlock via PATH instead of hardcoded absolute path
Add `tlock update` command to refresh wrapper scripts after app updates
debugging_tips: Keychain entry: security find-generic-password -s tlock -a master -w
App wrapper: cat /Applications/<App>.app/Contents/MacOS/<exec> (should be bash script if locked)
Touch ID test: swift -e '<paste TOUCHID_SWIFT_SOURCE from auth.js>'

recovery_procedures.broken_app_lock: Manually rename <exec>.tlock-original back to <exec> in Contents/MacOS/, then delete the config entry
recovery_procedures.lost_dmg_password: Password is in Keychain: security find-generic-password -s tlock -a master -w
recovery_procedures.corrupt_config: Delete ~/.tlock/config.json; DMGs remain in ~/.tlock/ and can be manually mounted
